localized_texts.text: Toast Box Voucher

Indulge in the rich flavors and comforting aromas of a quintessential Asian breakfast with our Ultimate Toast Box Experience Package. This exclusive package combines a variety of delightful offerings, making it the perfect gift for any food lover or a special treat for yourself.
Authentic Nanyang Flavors: Enjoy signature kaya toast, soft-boiled eggs, and kopi at Toast Box, inspired by traditional Singapore coffee shop culture.
Iconic Local Breakfast: Experience a classic Singapore-style breakfast set loved by locals and visitors across the city.
Convenient Dining Voucher: Redeem your voucher easily at selected outlets, perfect for a quick meal break while exploring Singapore.
Traditional Coffee Experience: Taste freshly brewed kopi and teh prepared the traditional Nanyang way for a rich and aromatic flavor.
Casual Café Atmosphere: Relax in a nostalgic café setting designed to reflect Singapore’s heritage coffee shop culture.

Enjoy a delightful taste of Singapore’s classic breakfast culture with the Ultimate Toast Box Experience Package at Toast Box. This voucher offers a satisfying selection of traditional favorites, allowing you to savor the comforting flavors and aromas of a quintessential Asian breakfast.From crispy kaya toast paired with soft-boiled eggs to a cup of freshly brewed kopi or teh, the experience reflects the heritage of Singapore’s beloved coffee shop traditions. It’s a simple yet authentic way to enjoy a local dining moment, whether you’re starting your day or taking a relaxing break while exploring the city.
Applicable to all Items in store
Valid for dine in and take out orders
What’s included: Toasboxt $5 Voucher
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: at the cashier

Terms & Conditions: Admission Voucher is valid for 6 months from the date of issue.Eligibility Not redeemable for cash. Unused value is not refundable. Voucher may be used cumulatively.Attraction Access Voucher is valid for redemption at all Toast Box stores in Singapore, except at Jewel Changi Airport and outlets located in Food Republic, Food Junction, or Food Opera.Additional Information Expired vouchers will not be accepted, and no extensions will be granted.Important Notes Toast Box reserves the right to amend the terms and conditions at any time without prior notice.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter
How to use: Voucher is strictly valid on the date of redemption and subject to availability.
How to use: Present the barcode for admission, and you're good to go!

Terms & Conditions: Toast Box Voucher Validity for 6 months Not redeemable for cash. Unused value is not refundable. May be used cumulatively. This voucher is valid for redemption at all Toast Box Stores Singapore except, Jewel Changi Airport, and Outlets in Food Republic, Food Junction or Food Opera Expired vouchers will not be accepted and strictly no extensions are allowed. Toast Box reserves the right to amend the terms and conditions at all times without prior notice. Cable Car Sky Pass - Round Trip (Direct Entry) Valid 180 days from the date of purchase Free admission for children below 4 years old. We reserve the right to request for presentation of documents for verification of age. Both the Mount Faber Line and Sentosa Line have to be used on the same day of redemption. Cable Car Sky Pass refers to one round trip on Mount Faber Line and Sentosa Line and is valid for same-day use only.
What’s included: 2 x Soft Boiled Eggs
What’s included: Choice of Toast : Kaya Traditional Toast
What’s included: Choice of Hot Beverage: Kopi, Kopi O, Teh, Teh O, Milo, Yuan Yang & Barley

Terms & Conditions: Admission Voucher is valid for 3 months from the date of issue.Eligibility This voucher entitles the holder to kaya toast, a cup of hot beverage, and 2 half-boiled eggs. Offer is not valid with other discounts, promotions, privileges, or loyalty programs.Attraction Access Voucher is valid for redemption at all Toast Box stores in Singapore, except at Jewel Changi Airport and outlets located in Food Republic, Food Junction, or Food Opera.Additional Information This voucher is not exchangeable for cash. Lost or damaged vouchers will not be replaced or accepted. Expired vouchers will not be accepted, and no extensions will be granted.Important Notes Toast Box reserves the right to amend the terms and conditions at any time without prior notice.
What’s included: Toasboxt $10 Voucher
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: At the cashier
What’s included: $5 Cash Voucher
What’s included: $12 hi!Tourist SIM Card
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Refer to the 2nd page onwards for the barcode to scan at the entrance

Terms & Conditions: $12 hi!Tourist SIM Card T&Cs: Order submission is final and there is strictly no refund, exchange or cancellation once payment is successful. SIM card registration is compulsory and activation of SIM card must be done at collection, otherwise your SIM card will be invalid. Note: From 15 July 2024 under IMDA’s regulations, SIM registration with passport will be subjected to thirty (30) days validity. To retain your SIM for more than 30 days, re-registration is required at any Singtel Shop, Singtel Exclusive Retailer or Singtel mRemit Lucky Plaza #01-11 with a valid Singapore-issued Identity Card / Work pass within thirty (30) days of your SIM registration. After thirty (30) days, your passport registered Prepaid Card will be suspended without prior notice or liability to you, and there shall be no refund in relation to any such suspended Prepaid Card. The person registering the SIM card at the collection point needs to be at least 15 years old. Original physical passport must be presented for non-Singaporean / NRIC for Singapore citizen during redemption. $5 Voucher Validity for 6 months Not redeemable for cash. Unused value is not refundable. May be used cumulatively. This voucher is valid for redemption at all Toast Box Stores Singapore except, Jewel Changi Airport, and Outlets in Food Republic, Food Junction or Food Opera Expired vouchers will not be accepted and strictly no extensions are allowed. Toast Box reserves the right to amend the terms and conditions at all times without prior notice.
What’s included: Comforting Local Breakfast Set Voucher
